---
title: "Bibliography"
format: html
bibliography:
  journal: assets/bib/cv_journals.json
  conference: assets/bib/cv_proceedings.json
  talk: assets/bib/cv_talks.json
  poster: assets/bib/cv_posters.json
  preprint: assets/bib/cv_preprints.json
csl: assets/bib/apa-cv.csl
nocite: "@*"
filters:
  - multibib
resources:
  - assets/bib/cv_journals.json
  - assets/bib/cv_proceedings.json
  - assets/bib/cv_talks.json
  - assets/bib/cv_posters.json
  - assets/bib/cv_preprints.json
  - assets/bib/apa-cv.csl
---

We try to keep this page as up to date as possible. It is machine generated from
a zotero library with all of the research products.

## Journal Articles

::: {#refs-journal}
:::
   

## Conference Proceedings

::: {#refs-conference}
:::

## Talks and Conference Talks

::: {#refs-talk}
:::

## Posters

::: {#refs-poster}
:::

## Preprints

::: {#refs-preprint}
:::
